## Security

- [ ] This change does **not** add or modify security controls.
- [ ] It touches security (auth, validation, secrets, CORS, WebSocket) — described below.

<!-- If it touches security, describe the impact. Do NOT report vulnerabilities here: use SECURITY.md. -->

## Hardware

- [ ] Does not require hardware (verifiable in software or with the `tools/` simulator).
- [ ] Requires physical hardware (ESP32 / Raspberry Pi) for end-to-end validation.

## Responsible use

- [ ] This change aligns with the **defensive and academic** purpose of the project and does not enable offensive use.
- [ ] It does not include real sensitive data (MAC/BSSID/SSID, tokens or credentials); only synthetic data.
- [ ] I have read and follow [CONTRIBUTING.en.md](CONTRIBUTING.en.md) ([Español](CONTRIBUTING.md)) and [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).
